settings.heading: Marathon Event Medals Package
settings.subheading: Finisher medals for every runner plus podium trophies and category awards in one event package — custom artwork, ribbons and branding for marathons, runs and cycling events. Bulk pricing, pan-India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices; per-piece rates fall sharply at higher quantities. GST invoice included.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy bundles finisher medals for all runners plus podium and category awards into one marathon package — custom artwork, ribbons and branding, from around ₹60 a medal. Delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: One bundle for the whole event
settings.text: An event needs a finisher medal for everyone and trophies for the podium and categories. We package it all together: large custom finisher medals on branded ribbons, plus overall and age-category podium awards, designed around your event artwork — one order, one invoice, delivered on schedule.

settings.title: Finisher medal for all
settings.text: Large custom medals on branded ribbons for every runner.

settings.title: Your event artwork
settings.text: Custom medal shapes, spinners and branding.

settings.title: Volume-ready
settings.text: Hundreds to thousands, delivered on time.

settings.title: Share your award list
settings.text: WhatsApp us your categories, quantities and event date.

settings.title: Pick designs & budget
settings.text: We send matching options and a single combined quote.

settings.title: Approve engraving proof
settings.text: Confirm names, logos and titles on a digital mockup.

settings.title: Delivered together
settings.text: Co-ordinated, boxed and shipped pan-India in time for your event.

settings.question: How early should we order?
settings.answer: 3–4 weeks ahead for custom artwork, die-striking and ribbons on large volumes. Rush options exist.

settings.question: Can finisher medals have a custom shape?
settings.answer: Yes — cut-outs, spinners and event-specific shapes are standard for finisher packages.

settings.question: Do you include podium trophies?
settings.answer: Yes — overall and age-category trophies are bundled with the finisher medals.

settings.heading: Planning a marathon or run?
settings.text: Send your award list and date — we'll design a matching combo and quote, usually within the hour.
